theme_notes: Touchstones: UK Labour's historic local election collapse as Reform UK storms England and Wales and Starmer refuses to resign; the US-Iran military exchange straining the Strait of Hormuz ceasefire. Also: Trump's Cuba annexation claim, Wembanyama's 12-block NBA playoff record, a hantavirus cruise ship crisis off Spain, and a blowout US jobs report.
settled: All square. Labour's vote share isn't this clean right now. Congratulations.
You're even. Keir Starmer would kill for numbers this good.
Zero owed. The hantavirus cruise ship has worse problems. You're fine.
youOwe: Under $50. Wembanyama blocked more value than this in the first quarter.
Smaller than what Trump paid for Cuba. Which was nothing. Try harder.
The April jobs report beat by 50,000. Your effort underperformed by more.
Labour lost a thousand council seats last night. You lost $50–200. Both hurt.
About the cost of a hantavirus test kit per passenger. Roughly this bad.
Enough for Farage's victory champagne. Not enough for your self-respect.
You're the Keir Starmer of this relationship: refusing to quit, losing ground.
The Strait of Hormuz ceasefire is shakier than your budget. Just barely.
Wembanyama set a playoff blocked-shots record. You've set a personal-debt record.
Trump's claiming Cuba for free. You can't pay back half a grand. Embarrassing.
Reform UK flipped England overnight. This debt has flipped you from partner to liability.
April jobs came in double the forecast. Your payment came in at zero.
You are the Labour government: deep in the red, no exit plan, blaming the Tories.
The hantavirus cruise ship will dock and be cleared before this sees a payment.
This much owed with no plan. At least Starmer held a press conference.
Trump took Cuba. Your partner is about to take everything else you own.
Iran and the US traded fire for 70 days. Your debt has been running longer.
This isn't a debt. It's an occupied territory with a Venmo handle.
theyOwe: They owe you under $50. Technically a ceasefire. Probably temporary.
Less than Farage's bar tab after last night. Collect before he celebrates more.
Wembanyama blocked 12 shots in one game. Block their next excuse instead.
Starmer's still PM despite the numbers. You should be less forgiving.
115,000 jobs added in April. None of them paying your partner's debt.
Reform UK flipped 1,200 seats. They've been sitting on your money for months.
Real money. The Strait of Hormuz is calmer than you should be right now.
They owe enough to quarantine a cruise ship cabin. Consider quarantining them.
Labour lost Wales. You're about to lose patience. One of those is reversible.
Half a grand. Trump got an entire country for free. You can't get this.
The jobs report smashed forecasts by 50,000. This repayment has smashed nothing.
Labour lost Wales in a single night. You've been losing this money for months. Escalate.
The hantavirus cruise declared a health emergency. So should your accountant.
You've essentially lent them Cuba. And you're not getting the ports.
Iran asked for a ceasefire. You've asked for repayment. One got more traction.
Trump annexed Cuba. Your partner annexed your savings. Cuba at least has beaches.
You are no longer a partner. You are a creditor. Get a mediator with a UK passport.
The Strait of Hormuz ceasefire has held longer than your patience should. It's done.
